common.textNodeSubtitle: For prompts, notes, or generated copy.
common.imageNodeSubtitle: For references, uploads, or generated still images.
common.audioNodeSubtitle: For uploaded clips, sound effects, or generated audio.
common.videoNodeSubtitle: For timeline output, motion references, or generated video.

pages.listLoginTitle: Sign in to view your canvases
pages.listLoginDescription: Canvas documents are tied to your account. Sign in to create, rename, delete, and reopen canvases across sessions.
pages.editorLoginTitle: Sign in to edit this canvas
pages.editorLoginDescription: Canvas editing is tied to your account. Sign in first, then reopen this canvas to continue.

list.heroDescription: Add text, image, and video nodes to build your multimodal workflow.
list.title: AI Canvas
list.subtitle: Create a canvas to branch ideas visually and connect text, image, and video nodes in one workspace.
list.emptyDescription: Start with a blank canvas and build your first multimodal workflow.
list.recentTemplatesSubtitle: Templates you opened from shared links show up here so you can reuse them quickly.

toast.reloadCanvasFailed: Failed to reload the latest canvas.
toast.refreshNodeStatusFailed: Failed to refresh node run status.
toast.selectSingleNode: Select only one node before running.
toast.switchToGenerateMode: Switch this node to generate mode before running.
toast.newerCanvasVersionDetected: A newer canvas version was detected.

media.attachImageDescription: Attach an existing image asset to this canvas node.
media.attachVideoDescription: Attach an existing video asset to this canvas node.
media.signInRequired: Sign in to access saved assets.

studio.doubleClickTextNode: Double-click to write or edit this text node.
studio.noteEditorHint: Double-click the note card to edit text and use bold, italic, or underline.
studio.dragBetweenZones: Drag thumbnails between zones to change reference type
studio.styleReferenceDrop: Drop images here to control style.
studio.omniReferenceDrop: Drop images here to lock character or object consistency.
studio.promptPlaceholderText: Describe what this text node should write, summarize, or rewrite.
studio.promptPlaceholderImage: Use a Midjourney-style prompt: subject, scene, framing, lighting, style, and detail. Example: editorial fashion portrait, woman in silver armor, neon alley, full body, low angle, cinematic rim light, ultra detailed
studio.promptPlaceholderAudio: Describe the sound effect or audio texture you want to generate.
studio.promptPlaceholderGeneric: Describe what this {nodeType} node should generate or transform.
studio.conflictBannerTitle: A newer version of this canvas exists on the server.
studio.conflictBannerDescription: Local editing is temporarily locked to avoid overwriting newer graph data.
studio.templateLinkDescription: Anyone with this link can open the template, copy it into their own canvas space, and keep editing from there.
studio.uploadAudioHint: Attach an MP3 or WAV file to this audio node.
studio.noAudioFile: This node does not have an audio file yet.
studio.sceneAutoDescription: Scene is inferred automatically: image prompt references use image-to-image, otherwise text-to-image.
studio.dragFilesHere: Drop image, video, audio, md, or txt files here
studio.emptyStateTitle: Start with a freeform AI canvas
studio.emptyStateDescription: Add text nodes for ideas, image nodes for references, video nodes for motion, or audio nodes for uploaded or generated sound. Double-click or right-click anywhere on the canvas to open the node menu.

runtime.textNodeNoVideo: Text nodes do not support direct video input.
runtime.textNodeNoAudio: Text nodes do not support direct audio input.
runtime.imageNodeNoVideo: Image nodes do not support direct video input.
runtime.imageNodeNoAudio: Image nodes do not support direct audio input.
runtime.audioNodeTextOnly: Audio nodes currently support text context only.
runtime.audioNodeNoAudio: Audio nodes do not support direct audio input.
runtime.promptRequired: Enter a prompt or connect at least one text context.
runtime.seedanceAudioOnly: Only Seedance 2 Stable and Ark video models currently support audio input.
runtime.audioNeedsImageOrVideo: Audio input requires at least one connected image or video reference.
runtime.seedanceFirstFrameImageCount: First-frame mode requires exactly 1 reference image.
runtime.seedanceFirstLastImageCount: First-and-last-frame mode requires 1 to 2 reference images.
runtime.seedanceFrameModeMediaUnsupported: First-frame and first-and-last-frame modes do not support audio or video references.
runtime.midjourneyNeedsImagePrompt: Midjourney image-to-image mode requires at least one image prompt reference.
runtime.conflictLoadLatest: This canvas has a version conflict. Load the latest version first.
runtime.connectionMustConnectSides: Canvas connections must link opposite handles: left-to-right or right-to-left.
runtime.styleReferenceImagesOnly: Style and omni references currently accept image nodes only.
runtime.videoOutputVideoOnly: Video output can currently connect only to video nodes.
runtime.audioOutputVideoOnly: Audio output can currently connect only to video nodes.
runtime.audioTargetTextOnly: Audio nodes currently accept text input only.
runtime.videoToImageUnsupported: Connecting video directly to image nodes is not supported yet.
runtime.connectionUnsupported: This connection type is not supported.
runtime.unsupportedVideoFormat: Unsupported video format. Please upload MP4 or MOV.
runtime.audioFormatUnsupported: Unsupported audio format. Please upload MP3 or WAV.
runtime.latestSavedElsewhere: Another tab already saved a newer version. Load the latest canvas before continuing.

template.subtitle: Open this workflow as a reusable starting point, then copy it into your own canvas before you edit.
template.useNowTitle: Copy this template to your workspace
template.useNowDescription: Create a private copy in your own canvas space, then change prompts, references, and structure without affecting the shared template.
template.signInDescription: Sign in first, then copy this template into your own canvas space.
template.noNodes: This template does not contain any nodes yet.
template.noPreviewText: This template does not have a preview yet.
